description: Allows the mob to randomly look around.
title: Random Look Around

angle_of_view_horizontal.title: Angle Of View Horizontal
angle_of_view_horizontal.description: The angle in degrees that an entity can see in the Y-axis (up-down).

angle_of_view_vertical.title: Angle Of View Vertical
angle_of_view_vertical.description: The angle in degrees that an entity can see in the X-axis (left-right).

look_time.title: Look Time
look_time.description: The range of time in seconds the mob will stay looking in a random direction before looking elsewhere

probability.title: Probability
probability.description: The probability of looking at the target.
